intent: Implement Autonomy + UX + Self-Learning surface for the schedule-dispatcher / digest / dashboard / learning ecosystem. Eight phases (P8 conditional). Migrate digest action items from prose to typed events; introduce dashboard cards with one-click headless actions; record every fix to resolutions.jsonl with full schema from day 1; build a self-learning ladder (preselect -> auto-apply with undo -> silent) with an auto-fix auditor as the safety brake; surface everything in /settings/learning + /settings/auditor cockpit panels. Mechanical-first throughout; LLM only for v0.3 semantic-drift check.

steps.name: Load Scenario Template
steps.result: AGENTING template (FIXED START + DYNAMIC MIDDLE + FIXED END)

steps.name: Create Session & Artifacts
steps.result: implementation-plan.md + plan-manifest.json + README.md + pre-flight-decisions.md created in docs/_planned/autonomy-ux-self-learning/

behavior.Adjust: Return to Step 4 (Gather Context) with feedback

behavior.Modify: Return to Step 4 (Gather Context) with existing plan as context

softDependencies: docs/_planned/wiki-missing-layers/ (in implementation; resolutions.jsonl schema additions ride on whatever ships anyway)
